name: Mossadams
notes: Moss Adams LLP is a large accounting and consulting firm (top-10 US CPA firm) headquartered in Seattle, WA. None of the standard vocab labels fit precisely; using 'Professional Services' as the most accurate short label.

name: Andrewsmixers
notes: Andrew's Mixers is an events and community-building company founded by Andrew Yeung, HQ in New York, NY. Hosts curated tech/business networking events. Now rebranded/also known as 'fibe'.

name: Menlovc
notes: Menlo Ventures, founded 1976, is a venture capital firm headquartered at 1300 El Camino Real, Menlo Park, CA.

name: Corylevy
notes: corylevy.com is the personal site of Cory Levy, entrepreneur and angel investor, founder of Z Fellows. Based in San Francisco. This is a personal portfolio/investor site, not a traditional company. Industry labeled as Venture Capital given his primary role as early-stage investor.

name: Notation
notes: Notation Capital is a pre-seed VC firm founded in 2015 by Nick Chirls and Alex Lines, headquartered in Brooklyn, NY 11215.

name: Princeville Holdings
notes: Could not identify a clear company matching 'Princeville Holdings' in a CRM context. Found Princeville Holdings LLC (Wyoming LLC, address in Laguna Beach CA) and separately Princeville Capital (SF-based VC). No website or domain confirmed. Without more context, cannot confidently assign.

name: Manresa
notes: Manresa Ventures is a VC firm founded 2019, HQ at 921 Front St, San Francisco, CA 94105, focused on fintech and payments. 'Manresa' alone could also refer to other entities (e.g. a restaurant), but the VC firm is the most CRM-relevant match.

name: Parallel
notes: Best match for 'Parallel' in New York is Parallel Learning (parallellearning.com), an EdTech/digital health company providing psychoeducational services, founded 2020-2021, raised $48.9M. Multiple companies named Parallel exist; NYC location supports this match.

name: Motion Sports Inc.
notes: Motion Sports Inc. is a sports-tech SaaS company at 642 N Madison St, Bloomington, IN 47404. Builds technology platforms for college athletic departments.
